about.title: AI Lifestyle & Civilization Systems
about.description: Chorn Planet connects intelligent mobility, Smart Food, AI Luxury, Style, and practical technology into an evolving platform exploring future-ready living, connected environments, and human-centered digital experiences.

blocks.title: AI Native Platform
blocks.body: Chorn Planet is built as an AI-native platform, not only a content site. The first launch focuses on clear public surfaces that can later support smarter recommendations, content workflows, product storytelling, and useful service experiences.

blocks.title: AI Smart Food
blocks.body: Smart Food is the practical daily-life layer. It gives Chorn Planet a useful starting point around food discovery, menu information, customer experience, ordering concepts, and future AI-assisted food service flows.

blocks.title: AI Luxury
blocks.body: AI Luxury is the premium project layer for property, destination, and lifestyle narratives. It helps turn high-value projects into clearer stories, visual systems, and investor-ready platform content.

blocks.title: Style and Outfit Direction
blocks.body: Style gives the platform a visual lifestyle layer. Outfit concepts become scenes, stories, and product direction across travel, culture, soft luxury, and future commerce.

blocks.title: AI Smart Mobility
blocks.body: AI Smart Mobility explores intelligent transportation, connected infrastructure, and future mobility experiences through the Chorn Planet MTS Network. It acts as the circulatory system connecting destinations, tourism, lifestyle environments, and future-ready civilization concepts.

blocks.title: Smart City Systems
blocks.body: Smart City Systems explores how intelligent environments, connected infrastructure, mobility coordination, and human-centered urban experiences may evolve together. The platform observes how future cities can balance technology, movement, comfort, sustainability, and everyday life within connected civilization ecosystems.
